user.title: Sidebar Panel
user.description: Add a custom web page panel to the Home Assistant sidebar

data_description.title: The name displayed in the sidebar, e.g. Node-RED

abort.already_configured: A panel with this name already exists

data_description.icon: Icon displayed in the sidebar, e.g. mdi:nodejs
data_description.url: Web page URL to embed, supports port numbers (e.g. 1880) and relative paths
data_description.mode: Choose how the panel is displayed
data_description.require_admin: When enabled, only admins can see this panel in the sidebar
data_description.proxy_access: Proxy requests through the HA server to resolve CORS issues (do not enable if unsure)

error.invalid_url: Invalid URL format. Enter a full URL (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:1880) or a port number
error.invalid_builtin_url: Built-in page URL must start with / (e.g. /config/dashboard)

options.2: New Page - Open in new tab

yaml_deprecated.title: YAML configuration is deprecated
yaml_deprecated.description: YAML configuration for Sidebar Panel is deprecated. Please configure panels via Settings → Devices & Services → Add Integration. YAML configuration will be ignored.
